untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time access to: (1) single stock futures prices vs cash stock prices, (2) theoretical futures pricing calculations using cost-of-carry model (e^(rT) - Σ(Dividend × e^(rTM))), (3) interest rates (r), (4) dividend yield and timing data, (5) time-to-expiration (T), and (6) minimum discrepancy thresholds. None of these inputs are available in the allowed indicator list, which contains only technical price/volume indicators. Spread arbitrage execution requires multi-instrument data feeds and financial calculations outside the scope of single-instrument technical analysis.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_13 describes a fundamental arbitrage strategy requiring market microstructure data (futures vs spot prices), cost-of-carry calculations, and dividend data. This cannot be expressed using only the available technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, returns). A proper implementation would require a separate multi-leg futures-equity arbitrage engine with real-time pricing feeds.
